posts.title: Why I'm Starting This Journal
posts.excerpt: A few thoughts on making space for reflection every weekend.
posts.content:
I wanted a place to put my thoughts and feelings without any pressure. Just a quiet corner where I can show up every weekend and write what’s on my mind.

It doesn’t have to be long or profound. Some weeks it might be a single idea. Other weeks it might be a ramble. The point is to show up, be honest, and give myself a record of how I was feeling over time.

Here’s to the first of many weekends.

posts.title: Thoughts on Trust and People
posts.excerpt: I don't know when I choose like crossing all the Washington seas and 24 hours flight I need to reach here.
posts.content:
I know I know and that everyone knows this art one do rotate itself to complete one day and I know my problems is revolving around me for what I did even. I don’t know when I choose like crossing all the Washington seas and 24 hours flight I need to reach here.

I feel like there will be somebody who will care for me who will listen to me and who will stay with me for sometime or a long time I thought, but it’s not being fulfilled and I trust people and sharing some information and that they blamed me again they want to find interesting updates and they want all the crazy from one life and when we have a glitch or a ratio, then they will pull out that information because you did the two back patching. 

I know it’s sucked in this life. Life research in certain way that I don’t know what to do. I think I mature, but I’m not I feel people are best, but sometimes people are betrayed they they are not what you think Raj so be cautious to share anything like anything any information to anyone whether that if you’ve known him for 10 years also eight style they blame me blame for you the betrayed and the portrait you that you are negative that you are not that’s that’s how people do and one thing I believe like only family family your mom, your dad, your brother or your sister they will be understand you better and better for this life the people they don’t know what’s being something life and that I want to belong to belongs to that category and really I would play myself or I should play or others. 

I don’t know what is my mistake and friendly closely trusting making about socialize with people sharing experience, sharing everything feelings and people used the people well then they want entertainment from any kind of free drama it sometimes feel very bad very I know it’s March 3 and 2026 if I add it 3+36 it’s 2000 2626 and today I woke up at three. 

Maybe I don’t know why it’s three because of the three I think and everything is like putting putting myself in any proper way that I want to fix my life. I want to know what I’m doing and it sincerely I would say thanks too. Thanks to what since I would say thanks to myself or the person who will be supporting on my family even I feel very bad literally literally literally this is my situation and I will be sharing the more and more. 

What would to be done how I should be stop sharing my emotions my feelings about someone everyone I don’t want to trust anymore anyone I was bad don’t talk to me. I’m ugly. Don’t look at me, bro make a joke of me on back of me I don’t care.
